query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A figure captured mid-motion against a pale sky with soft clouds, wearing brown garments and a dark hat with a visible interior label, with bright pink and purple fabric elements visible near the lower portion of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred figure captured mid-action against a pale sky with soft clouds, rendered with extreme intentional blur and smeared detail throughout, creating an abstract effect where the subject's brown garments, dark hat with visible interior label, and bright pink and purple fabric elements dissolve into streaks and color smears with no sharp textures or defined edges.
